step1Text: Enter your destination, travel dates and number of guests to discover suitable accommodations.
step2Text: Choose your favorite accommodation and book securely and conveniently through our encrypted payment system.
step3Text: Receive all details via email and enjoy your unforgettable dream vacation stress-free.

about.missionText: At {name}, we believe that travel is more than just a vacation. It's an opportunity to gain new perspectives, understand cultures, and create unforgettable memories.
about.questionsText: Our team is available to help you anytime.

cookies.bannerText: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized content, and analyze our traffic. For details, see our

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function correctly. They enable core features like security, network management, and accessibility. You cannot opt out of these cookies.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and anonymous.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: These cookies enable the website to remember choices you make (such as your language or region) to provide enhanced, more personalized features.
